ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sensor_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that collected the data */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Relative humidity in percentage */,
  "light" INTEGER /* Light intensity in lux */,
  "co2" INTEGER /* CO2 concentration in parts per million (ppm) */,
  "ec" REAL /* Electrical conductivity in microsiemens per centimeter (uS/cm) */,
  "ph" REAL /* pH level */,
  "wet_temp" REAL /* Wet bulb temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "dew" REAL /* Dew point temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "hd" REAL /* Heat density in kilowatts per square meter (kW/m^2) */,
  "vpd" REAL /* Vapor pressure deficit in kilopascals (kPa) */,
  "update_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data was collected */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., sensor, manual entry, API) */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality or reliability of the data (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "data_flags" TEXT /* Flags for any issues or anomalies in the data (e.g., sensor malfunction, data corruption) */,
  "data_version" TEXT /* Version of the data (useful for version control and data integrity) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "sensor_name" TEXT /* Name of the sensor */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the sensor (e.g., Farm A, Greenhouse 1) */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was installed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the sensor (e.g., active, maintenance, offline) */,
  "sensor_model" TEXT /* Model of the sensor */,
  "sensor_serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the sensor */,
  "sensor_firmware_version" TEXT /* Firmware version of the sensor */,
  "sensor_calibration_date" TEXT /* Last calibration date of the sensor */,
  "sensor_calibration_expiration" TEXT /* Expiration date of the last calibration */,
  "sensor_maintenance_log" TEXT /* Log of maintenance activities (e.g., cleaning, repairs) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensors_location FOREIGN KEY ("location") REFERENCES locations ("location_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location (e.g., Farm A, Greenhouse 1) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographical latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographical longitude of the location */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the location */,
  "climate_zone" TEXT /* Climate zone of the location */,
  "soil_type" TEXT /* Type of soil at the location */,
  "irrigation_system" TEXT /* Type of irrigation system used at the location */,
  "climate_control_system" TEXT /* Type of climate control system used at the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., farm manager, data analyst, admin) */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user for quick communication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last activity */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, suspended, deleted) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access event */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., login, logout, view data) */,
  "resource" TEXT /* Resource accessed by the user (e.g., sensor data, user settings) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent (e.g., browser, device) used for access */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location (e.g., IP geolocation) of the access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alert_logs" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that triggered the alert */,
  "alert_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of the alert (e.g., high temperature, low humidity) */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message describing the alert */,
  "resolved" INTEGER /* Status of the alert resolution (e.g., true if resolved, false if pending) */,
  "alert_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the alert (e.g., critical, high, medium, low) */,
  "alert_source" TEXT /* Source of the alert (e.g., sensor, system, manual) */,
  "alert_response_time" INTEGER /* Time taken to respond to the alert (in seconds) */,
  "responder_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who responded to the alert */,
  "resolution_time" INTEGER /* Time taken to resolve the alert (in seconds) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alert_logs_responder_id FOREIGN KEY ("responder_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alert_logs_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_analytics" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor the analysis is based on */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of the analysis (e.g., temperature trend, humidity correlation) */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date the analysis was performed */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the analysis */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  "analysis_scope" TEXT /* Scope of the analysis (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "analysis_method" TEXT /* Method used for the analysis (e.g., statistical, machine learning) */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* Confidence level of the analysis results */,
  "impact_assessment" TEXT /* Assessment of the potential impact of the analysis results */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_analytics_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the setting */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "setting_category" TEXT /* Category of the setting (e.g., data, alerts, users) */,
  "setting_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the setting */,
  "setting_default_value" TEXT /* Default value of the setting */,
  "setting_min_value" TEXT /* Minimum value allowed for the setting */,
  "setting_max_value" TEXT /* Maximum value allowed for the setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id")
)
